commit_order_strategy: H_intake (this commit: intake/task/design/status + live funding-semantics evidence under reports/api-samples/<stage-id>/) -> H_A (warnings wording + doc + tests) -> H_B (frontend) -> H_C (integration + stage-level fingerprint + finalize). Controller commits serially so each task's base..head diff is owner-scoped.
